name: Zhejiang Tiantie Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Tiantie Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and marketing of track engineering rubber products in China. It offers track structures, such as rails, sleepers, and ballast; vibration damping products; isolated rubber damping pads; embedded rubber crossing boards and plates; conveyor belts; elastic components; and sealing products and other rubber products. The company also provides elastic support type non- ball track with rubber boots; rubber spring vibrators; rail waveguide absorbers; rubber wheel rims and grooves; cushioning pads and pavement products; railway rubber gaskets; and elastic integral bumper plates. Its products are used in urban rail transit, high-speed railway, heavy haul railway, ordinary railway, intercity railway, light railway, subway, and other rail transportation lines. The company also exports its products to Russia, the United States, Vietnam, Germany, Hong Kong, and internationally. Zhejiang Tiantie Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Taizhou, China.
